CREATE TABLE test_table (a UInt8, b UInt8);
SELECT bitRotateLeft(a + b, a) FROM test_table WHERE a < 100;
CREATE TABLE another_table (x UInt8, y UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY x;
SELECT a, b, bitRotateLeft(a, b) AS rotated FROM test_table JOIN another_table ON test_table.a = another_table.x;
WITH (SELECT AVG(y) FROM another_table) AS avg_y SELECT a, bitRotateLeft(a, CAST(avg_y AS UInt8)) FROM test_table;
SELECT bitRotateLeft(bitRotateLeft(a, b), b) AS double_rotated FROM test_table;
SELECT bitRotateLeft(0, 1) AS zero_case, bitRotateLeft(255, 1) AS upper_case, bitRotateLeft(128, 1) AS mid_case FROM test_table LIMIT 1;
